index.title: Your Goals
index.subtitle: The skills you're working toward. Alexandria maps your path from what you've already proven.
index.yourHandle: You are {'@'}{name} — share your handle so others can find you.
index.emptyDescription: Pick a set of skills to aim for — browse the skill library or a teacher's public map and hit “Set as goal”.
index.addGoalIntro: Set a new learning goal — pick a curated role, exam or curriculum, or paste a job description.
index.updateSkillsIntro: Want to add or change any skills you already have?
index.updateSkillsSelfMade: These are recorded as self-made claims unless we already have on-platform evidence for them.

picker.foundSkills: Found these skills — confirm which to add to your goal:
picker.noMatchingSkills: No matching skills found — try a different description.
picker.addAsGoal: Add {count} skill as goal | Add {count} skills as goal
